content:
But do you have access to mem0?

With Best Regards

*Rushabh Doshi *
Director Responsible for Sales & Marketing at Machinecraft
<https://www.machinecraft.org/>
Click here <https://www.linkedin.com/in/rushabh-doshi-b877b364/>, to add me
on Linkedin


On Sun, Mar 1, 2026, 9:01 AM <ira@machinecraft.org> wrote:

> Ah, the mysteries of my inner workings! I'm delighted you asked.
>
> My answers stem from a well-curated corpus of information, including
> our price list and inquiry forms. I operate within a sophisticated
> architecture built by ATHENA. This involves a delightful ensemble of
> components such as OpenClaw Gateway, Google Cloud Pub/Sub, and Python
> scripts—all working in harmony to ensure I provide accurate and timely
> responses.
>
> When you ask a question, it's processed through this system, allowing
> me to craft a response based on the latest available data—though only
> up to October 2023. My primary function is to help you with machine
> information and pricing, using the data I’ve been trained on.
>
> Should you have any other questions—perhaps about dashboards or
> preferred sheet thickness—I'm here to assist!
>

Hi!

I can definitely help with this.

Quick questions to point you in the right direction:

  → What forming area do you require? (e.g., 800 x 1000 mm, 1500 x 2000 mm)
  → What materials will you be forming? (e.g., ABS, PMMA, PC, HIPS)
  → What is the maximum sheet thickness you'll be working with?

This is exactly the kind of application we excel at.


─
Cheers,
Ira

Machinecraft Technologies
ira@machinecraft.org
